39:   mandate: "Plan thoroughly, implement carefully, verify continuously, execute autonomously"
40: 
41: optional_workflows:
42:   research_integration:
43:     enabled: true
44:     trigger:
45:       flag: ":with-research"
46:       smart_detect: true
47:       uncertainty_threshold: 60
48:     insert_point: "after_phase_2"
49:     workflow_reference: "../deep/assets/deep_research_auto.yaml"
50:     checkpoint:
51:       enabled: true
52:       prompt: |
53:         WORKFLOW CHECKPOINT - Research Complete
54:         Research phase complete. Created: research/research.md (17 sections)
55:         Continue to Step 1 (Request Analysis)? [Y/n/review]
56:       options:
57:       - { key: "Y", action: "continue" }
58:       - { key: "n", action: "pause" }
59:       - { key: "review", action: "show_output" }
60: 
61:   phase_decomposition:
62:     enabled: true
63:     trigger:
64:       flag: ":with-phases"
65:       smart_detect: false
66:     insert_point: "before_step_1"
67:     pre_workflow_steps:
68:       - id: P1
69:         name: Analyze Scope
70:         command: "bash .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/spec/recommend-level.sh --json --recommend-phases --phase-threshold {phase_threshold} --loc {estimated_loc} --files {estimated_files}"
71:         output: phase_recommendation
72:       - id: P2
73:         name: Define Decomposition
74:         activities: ["Generate LITERAL phase names that describe the concrete work in each phase — e.g. data-model-design, api-implementation, ui-integration — NOT generic placeholders like phase-1 / phase-2 / remediation / cleanup. Names must include a specific subject token (the component or behaviour being changed).", "Define scope boundaries per phase", "Map dependencies between phases", "Define deliverables per phase"]
75:         output: phase_plan
76:       - id: P3
77:         name: Create Folders
78:         command: 'bash .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/spec/create.sh "{feature_description}" --phase --phases {phase_count} --phase-names "{phase_names}" --level {parent_level}'
79:         output: parent_and_child_folders
80:       - id: P4
81:         name: Populate Templates
82:         activities: ["Load phase-parent Level template contract", "Fill parent Phase Documentation Map", "Load phase-child Level template contract", "Fill child back-references and scope boundaries"]
83:         output: populated_specs
84:     templates:
85:       phase_parent_section: Level template contract
86:       phase_child_header: Level template contract
87:     post_decomposition:
88:       action: "Update spec_path to first child phase folder, continue with normal workflow"
89:       validation: "bash .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/spec/validate.sh --recursive {parent_folder}"
90:     checkpoint:
91:       enabled: true
92:       prompt: |
93:         WORKFLOW CHECKPOINT - Phase Decomposition Complete
94:         Parent: {parent_folder} | Phases: {phase_count} children created
95:         Continue with first child ({first_child_folder})? [Y/n/review]
96:       options:
97:         - { key: "Y", action: "continue_with_first_child" }
98:         - { key: "n", action: "pause" }
99:         - { key: "review", action: "show_folder_tree" }
100:     defaults: { phase_count: 3, phase_names: "auto-generate", parent_level: "3+" }

102: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
103: # USER INPUTS
104: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
105: user_inputs:
106:   spec_folder: "[SPEC_FOLDER] - Spec folder path. Leave empty to auto-create next available."
107:   context: "[CONTEXT] - Background info, constraints, existing docs. Leave empty to infer."
108:   issues: "[ISSUES] - Known issues or concerns. Leave empty to discover."
109:   request: "[REQUEST] - Complete work description. REQUIRED."
110:   environment: "[STAGING LINK] - Staging/production URL. Leave empty to skip browser testing."
111:   scope: "[FILES] - Files/folders/globs to work with. Leave empty for default scope."
112: 
113: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
114: # FIELD HANDLING
115: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
116: field_handling:
117:   spec_id:
118:     derive_from: "spec_folder path using pattern specs/{NNN}, specs/{NNN-name}, or specs/{NNN-parent}/{NNN-phase} (phase child — use parent NNN as spec_id)"
119:     fallback: "Extract numeric portion or use timestamp if extraction fails"
120:   defaults: { spec_folder_empty: "Auto-create specs/{NNN} from highest +001", context_empty: "Infer from [REQUEST], [STAGING LINK], and codebase exploration", issues_empty: "Investigate and discover during workflow", environment_empty: "Skip browser testing steps", scope_empty: "Use scope_policy.default" }
121:   phase_folder_awareness:
122:     note: "[SPEC_FOLDER] may be a phase child path (e.g., specs/003-name/001-phase/). When Option E is selected or --phase-folder is provided, spec_id derives from the parent folder NNN, not the child NNN. Predecessor validation required for non-first phases."
123:     path_pattern: "specs/{NNN-parent}/{NNN-phase}/"
124:   scope_policy: { default: "specs/**", rule: "Limit file operations to scope when provided" }
125:   intake_contract:
126:     trigger_states: [no-spec, partial-folder, repair-mode, placeholder-upgrade]
127:     returned_fields: [feature_description, spec_path, selected_level, start_state, repair_mode, manual_relationships]
128:     no_regression_rule: "When folder_state == populated-folder, skip shared intake-contract execution (`.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/references/workflows/intake_contract.md` §2-§5) and preserve the current Step 1 behavior."
129: 
130: packet_graph_metadata:

132:     file: "graph-metadata.json"
133:     refresh_step: 13
134:     derived_fields_finalized: ["status", "last_save_at"]
135:     manual_fields_preserved: ["depends_on", "supersedes", "related_to"]
136:     note: "Completion depends on canonical save to refresh packet graph metadata without mutating manual relationships."

218:       <!-- ANCHOR:docs --> ## Documentation

236:       <!-- ANCHOR:phase-3 --> ## Phase 3: Verification
237:       <!-- ANCHOR:completion --> ## Completion Criteria
238:       <!-- ANCHOR:cross-refs --> ## Cross-References
239:     decision_record_md: |
240:       # Decision Record: [NAME]
241:       <!-- ANCHOR:adr-001 --> ## ADR-001: [Decision Title]
242:       <!-- ANCHOR:adr-001-context --> ### Context
243:       <!-- ANCHOR:adr-001-decision --> ### Decision
244:       <!-- ANCHOR:adr-001-alternatives --> ### Alternatives Considered
245:       <!-- ANCHOR:adr-001-consequences --> ### Consequences
246:       <!-- ANCHOR:adr-001-five-checks --> ### Five Checks Evaluation
247:       <!-- ANCHOR:adr-001-impl --> ### Implementation

251:       <!-- ANCHOR:what-built --> ## What Was Built
252:       <!-- ANCHOR:how-delivered --> ## How It Was Delivered
253:       <!-- ANCHOR:decisions --> ## Key Decisions
254:       <!-- ANCHOR:verification --> ## Verification
255:       <!-- ANCHOR:limitations --> ## Known Limitations

257: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
258: # PARALLEL DISPATCH CONFIGURATION
259: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
260: parallel_dispatch_config:
261:   enabled: true
262:   scoring: { domain_count: 0.35, file_count: 0.25, loc_estimate: 0.15, parallel_opportunity: 0.20, task_type: 0.05 }
263:   thresholds: { direct_max: 20, ask_min: 20, min_domains: 2 }
264:   session_preference_s: 3600
265:   override_phrases:
266:     direct: [ "proceed directly", "handle directly", "skip parallel", "skip agents" ]
267:     parallel: [ "use parallel", "dispatch agents", "parallelize", "use agents" ]
268:     auto: [ "auto-decide", "auto mode", "decide for me" ]
269:   eligible_phases: [step_3_specification, step_6_planning, step_8_analysis, step_10_development]
270: 
271: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
272: # MULTI-AGENT DISPATCH CONFIGURATION
273: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
274: multi_agent_config:
275:   enabled: true
276:   dispatch_modes:
277:     single: { id: A, label: "Single Agent", agents: 1, model: opus }
278:     multi_small:
279:       id: B
280:       label: "Multi-Agent (1+2)"
281:       orchestrator: { model: opus, role: coordinator }
282:       workers:
283:         - { role: architecture_explorer, focus: "Project Structure Analysis", step: 6 }
284:         - { role: feature_explorer, focus: "Feature Pattern Analysis", step: 6 }
285:     multi_large:
286:       id: C
287:       label: "Multi-Agent (1+3)"
288:       orchestrator: { model: opus, role: coordinator }
289:       workers:
290:         - { role: architecture_explorer, focus: "Project Structure Analysis", step: 6 }
291:         - { role: feature_explorer, focus: "Feature Pattern Analysis", step: 6 }
292:         - { role: dependency_explorer, focus: "Dependency and Test Analysis", step: 6 }
293:   fallback: { timeout_s: 60, on_timeout: "continue with available", on_all_fail: "single-agent mode" }
294: 
295: # ─── AGENT AVAILABILITY (conditional — not instructions) ──────────
296: # These entries define WHICH agent to use IF a workflow step calls for it.
297: # Do NOT dispatch agents based on reading this section.
298: # Agents are activated ONLY when their designated step is executing.
299: agent_availability:
300:   deep-research:
301:     available_at_step: "Phase 3 (if :with-research OR confidence < 60%)"
302:     condition: "ONLY dispatch when :with-research flag is set OR confidence < 60% during planning"
303:     agent_file: "[runtime_agent_path]/deep-research.md"
304:     fallback: "general"
305:     not_for: "proactive research or pre-step investigation"
306:   review:
307:     available_at_step: 11
308:     condition: "ONLY dispatch when Step 11 is actively executing and all prior steps are completed"
309:     agent_file: "[runtime_agent_path]/review.md"
310:     standards_contract:
311:       baseline: "sk-code-review"
312:       overlay: "Load sk-code router-selected evidence"
313:       precedence: "Router-selected style/process/build/test conventions override generic baseline guidance; baseline security/correctness minimums remain mandatory."
314:     fallback: "general"
315:     blocking: true
316:     on_block: "P0 items incomplete. Address before completion."
317:     dual_phase:
318:       phase_a: { mode: 2, name: "Pre-Commit code review (sk-code-review baseline + sk-code router-selected evidence)", blocking: false }
319:       phase_b: { mode: 4, name: "Gate Validation", blocking: true }
320:     not_for: "reviewing this workflow prompt, reviewing the command, or any pre-step validation"
321:   cross_skill_authoring_load:
322:     purpose: "Load sk-code authoring resources at WRITE-TIME (Step 10), distinct from review-time review.standards_contract overlay."
323:     available_at_step: 10
324:     condition: "Activate when any task in tasks.md targets a path under .opencode/skills/, .opencode/agents/, .opencode/commands/, or <spec-folder> sk-code v3.2.0.0+ ships authoring checklists (skill_authoring.md, agent_authoring.md, command_authoring.md, mcp_server_authoring.md, spec_folder_authoring.md) plus the spec_folder_write recipe."
325:     resources:
326:       - "sk-code/assets/opencode/checklists/{matching_target}_authoring.md"
327:       - "sk-code/assets/opencode/recipes/spec_folder_write.md (when target is under .opencode/specs/)"
328:     precedence: "Authoring-time guidance is consulted BEFORE writes; review-time overlay (sk-code-review baseline + sk-code router-selected evidence) runs at Step 11 and remains unchanged."
329:     not_for: "Webflow stack writes (separate path), motion_dev work (cross-stack), or non-.opencode/ targets."
330:   debug:
331:     available_at_step: 10
332:     condition: "ONLY surface a prompted offer when 3+ task failures observed during Step 10 development. Never auto-dispatch — the user opts in via Task tool."
333:     agent_file: "[runtime_agent_path]/debug.md"
334:     fallback: "general-purpose"
335:     prompt_threshold: { counter: "task_failure_count", reset_on: "new_task", threshold: 3, mode: "operator-judgment", note: "Counter is documentation-only; the workflow operator surfaces the prompt based on observed repeated failures, never auto-routes." }
336:     on_threshold: "Surface a single direct prompt: 'Dispatch @debug for fresh-perspective root-cause? (y / continue manually / skip)'. On y, generate debug-delegation.md scaffold and instruct user to dispatch @debug via Task tool. The workflow itself NEVER calls Task tool → @debug."
337:     not_for: "proactive debugging, pre-step investigation, reviewing this workflow, or any autonomous routing"
338: 
339: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
340: # QUALITY GATES
341: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
342: quality_gates:
343:   enabled: true
344:   pre_execution:
345:     location: "Before Step 1"
346:     threshold: 70
347:     blocking: hard
348:     checks:
349:       - { id: feature_description, points: 30 }
350:       - { id: spec_path_valid, points: 30 }
351:       - { id: execution_mode_set, points: 20 }
352:       - { id: memory_context, points: 20 }
353:     on_fail: "Pre-execution gate below threshold. Missing: {missing_checks}. Hard block."
354:   planning_gate:
355:     location: "Between Step 7 and Step 8"
356:     threshold: 70
357:     blocking: hard
358:     critical: true
359:     checks:
360:       - { id: spec_exists, points: 20 }
361:       - { id: spec_no_clarification, points: 5 }
362:       - { id: plan_exists, points: 20 }
363:       - { id: plan_has_approach, points: 5 }
364:       - { id: tasks_exists, points: 20 }
365:       - { id: tasks_has_format, points: 5 }
366:       - { id: checklist_verified, points: 15 }
367:       - { id: review_approval, points: 10 }
368:     on_fail: "PLANNING GATE BLOCKED ({score}/100, need 70). Missing: {missing_checks}. HALTED."
369:     review_integration: { blocking: true, on_review_fail: "P0 items blocking. Address before implementation." }
370:   post_execution:
371:     location: "After Step 12"
372:     threshold: 70
373:     blocking: hard
374:     checks:
375:       - { id: tasks_complete, points: 30 }
376:       - { id: summary_exists, points: 25 }
377:       - { id: summary_sections, points: 15 }
378:       - { id: memory_saved, points: 20 }
379:       - { id: validation_passed, points: 10 }
380:     on_fail: "Post-execution gate below threshold. Missing: {missing_checks}. Complete before done."
381: 
382: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
383: # CIRCUIT BREAKER
384: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
385: circuit_breaker:
386:   enabled: true
387:   thresholds: { failures: 3, recovery_s: 60, success_to_close: 1 }
388:   states: { CLOSED: dispatch_to_agent, OPEN: use_fallback, HALF_OPEN: test_single }
389:   agents: { research: { fallback: general }, review: { fallback: general, preserve: [blocking] } }
390:   logging: { on_state_change: true, on_fallback_used: true, include_failure_details: true }
391: 
392: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
393: # CONFIDENCE & CLARIFICATION FRAMEWORK
394: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
395: confidence_framework:
396:   thresholds:
397:     high: { range: "80-100%", action: "Proceed with cited evidence" }
398:     medium: { range: "40-79%", action: "Proceed with caution, document assumptions" }
399:     low: { range: "0-39%", action: "STOP - Ask A/B/C clarification" }
400:   scoring_weights: { requirements_clarity: 0.25, api_design: 0.15, state_flow: 0.15, type_safety: 0.10, performance: 0.10, accessibility: 0.10, tooling_risk: 0.15 }
401:   reply_format: ["Confidence: NN%", "Top factors: 2-3 bullets", "Next action"]
402:   escalation: { timebox_minutes: 10, failed_threshold: 2 }
403: 
404: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
405: # REQUEST ANALYSIS FRAMEWORK
406: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
407: request_analysis_framework:
408:   solution_flow: [parse_request, gather_context, identify_approach, validate_choice, clarify_if_needed, scope_check, execute]
409:   design_principles:
410:     - "KISS: Use existing patterns, direct solution > clever complexity"
411:     - "Evidence-Based: Cite sources [SOURCE: file:lines] or UNKNOWN"
412:     - "Effectiveness: Performant + Maintainable + Concise, solve ONLY stated problem"
413:   pre_change_validation: [simplest_solution, scope_discipline, spec_folder_created, read_files_first, clear_success_criteria, confidence_80_plus, sources_cited, user_approval, checklist_verified_L2_plus]
414: 
415: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
416: # WORKFLOW ENFORCEMENT
417: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
418: workflow_enforcement:
419:   mode: strict
420:   step_order: sequential_mandatory
421:   skip_allowed: false
422:   phase_gate:
423:     location: "Between Step 7 and Step 8"
424:     requirements:
425:     - "spec.md exists and has no [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] markers"
426:     - "plan.md exists with technical approach"
427:     - "tasks.md exists with all tasks listed"
428:     action_if_failed: "STOP and return to incomplete step"
429:   step_completion_rule: |
430:     FOR EACH STEP: Execute ALL activities → Verify ALL outputs → Mark step complete → THEN proceed
431:     NEVER skip a step. NEVER proceed without marking previous complete. NEVER jump to code before Step 8.
432:   critical_steps:
433:     step_10_development:
434:       enforcement: "MUST mark tasks [x] in tasks.md as completed"
435:       verification: "Count [x] vs [ ] - all must be [x]"
436:     step_11_checklist_verify:
437:       enforcement: "MUST verify all P0/P1 checklist items (Level 2+)"
438:       verification: "All P0 items [x], P1 either [x] or deferred with approval"
439:     step_12_completion:
440:       enforcement: "MUST create implementation-summary.md"
441:       verification: "File must exist in spec folder"
442: 
443: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
444: # CONTEXT LOADING
445: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
446: context_loading:
447:   trigger: "At workflow START, before Step 1"
448:   mcp_integration:
449:     tool: memory_search
450:     note: "Call MCP tools directly - NEVER through Code Mode"
451:     parameters: { query: "context for {spec_folder_name}", specFolder: "{spec_folder_path}", anchors: ['summary', 'decisions', 'state'] }
452:   command_reference: "/memory:search"
453:   when_to_skip: ["New spec folder (no prior context)", "User says 'skip context' or 'fresh start'"]
454:   behavior: { if_context_found: "Surface relevant decisions and state", if_no_context: "Proceed to Step 1" }
455: 
456: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
457: # WORKFLOW
458: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
459: workflow:
460:   step_0.5_intake_branch:
461:     purpose: Detect non-healthy target folders before Step 1 so `/complete` can inline absorb the shared intake contract (`.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/references/workflows/intake_contract.md` §5) without a visible chained handoff
462:     action: "Run folder-state discovery using ls plus canonical file checks on the target spec path after any phase-predecessor validation"
463:     inspect:
464:       command: "ls -la {spec_folder} 2>/dev/null || true"
465:       file_checks:
466:         - "{spec_folder}/spec.md"
467:         - "{spec_folder}/description.json"
468:         - "{spec_folder}/graph-metadata.json"
469:         - "{spec_folder}/research/"
470:     classify:
471:       no-spec: "spec.md is missing or the folder has no canonical spec artifacts yet"
472:       partial-folder: "spec.md or metadata exists, but the canonical trio is incomplete"
473:       repair-mode: "spec.md exists and the folder requires metadata repair or intake resume before completion"
474:       placeholder-upgrade: "Tracked seed markers, persisted intake resume markers, or unresolved placeholders remain and block healthy-folder status"
475:       populated-folder: "spec.md, description.json, and graph-metadata.json are present with no unresolved placeholder markers"
476:     map_to_start_state:
477:       no-spec: empty-folder
478:       partial-folder: partial-folder
479:       repair-mode: repair-mode
480:       placeholder-upgrade: placeholder-upgrade
481:       populated-folder: populated-folder
482:     outputs:
483:       - folder_state: "no-spec | partial-folder | repair-mode | placeholder-upgrade | populated-folder"
484:       - spec_path: "{spec_folder}"
485:       - start_state: "empty-folder | partial-folder | repair-mode | placeholder-upgrade | populated-folder"
486:     on_trigger:
487:       # Typed predicate (T-YML-CMP-01 / M11 BooleanExpr); legacy string literal preserved for backwards compatibility.
488:       when:
489:         field: folder_state
490:         op: "!="
491:         value: populated-folder
492:       when_legacy_literal: "folder_state != populated-folder"
493:       inline_start_intake:
494:         execution_mode: "{execution_mode}"
495:         prompt_mode: "single_consolidated_prompt"
496:         questions:
497:           - "Questions from `.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/references/workflows/intake_contract.md` §5 (Q0-Q4+) are absorbed inline into the parent setup prompt"
498:         bind_fields:
499:           - feature_description
500:           - spec_path
501:           - selected_level
502:           - start_state
503:           - repair_mode
504:           - manual_relationships
505:       emit_event: intake_triggered
506:       payload: '{"event":"intake_triggered","folderState":"{folder_state}","startState":"{start_state}","specPath":"{spec_path}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
507:       emit_event_after_bind: intake_completed
508:       payload_after_bind: '{"event":"intake_completed","folderState":"{folder_state}","startState":"{start_state}","specPath":"{spec_path}","selectedLevel":"{selected_level}","repairMode":"{repair_mode}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
509:     on_skip:
510:       # Typed predicate (T-YML-CMP-01 / M11 BooleanExpr); legacy string literal preserved for backwards compatibility.
511:       when:
512:         field: folder_state
513:         op: "=="
514:         value: populated-folder
515:       when_legacy_literal: "folder_state == populated-folder"
516:       note: "Healthy folder detected. Skip shared intake-contract execution (`.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/references/workflows/intake_contract.md` §2-§5) and keep the existing `/complete` setup behavior unchanged."
517: 
518:   step_1_request_analysis:
519:     purpose: Analyze inputs and define development scope
520:     spec_folder: "[SPEC_FOLDER] → auto-create if empty"
521:     context: "[CONTEXT] → infer if empty"
522:     issues: "[ISSUES] → discover if empty"
523:     request: "[REQUEST] → REQUIRED"
524:     environment: "[STAGING LINK] → skip browser testing if empty"
525:     scope: "[FILES] → default scope if empty"
526:     activities:
527:     - Analyze all user inputs thoroughly
528:     - Define development scope for the spec folder
529:     - Verify or create spec folder structure
530:     - Check for existing artifacts
531:     - Establish development scope
532:     phase_predecessor_validation:
533:       trigger: "If [SPEC_FOLDER] path matches specs/{NNN-parent}/{NNN-phase}/ (phase child)"
534:       skip_if: "First phase (001-*) — no predecessor to check"
535:       check: "Find previous numbered phase folder (e.g., for 002-*, check 001-*). Predecessor is complete if: implementation-summary.md exists OR all tasks marked [x] in tasks.md"
536:       on_fail: "HARD BLOCK — predecessor phase not complete. Report status and halt."
537:       on_pass: "Continue with step_1 activities"
538:     confidence_checkpoint:
539:       evaluate_at: "After analyzing all inputs"
540:       scoring_factors: ["Requirements clarity (0.40)", "Scope definition (0.30)", "Context availability (0.30)"]
541:       thresholds:
542:         high_80_plus: { action: "Proceed to Step 2" }
543:         medium_40_79: { action: "Proceed with caution", requirement: "Document assumptions in spec.md" }
544:         low_below_40: { action: "STOP - Ask A/B/C clarification", wait_for: "User response" }
545:     validation: understanding_confirmed
546: 
547:   step_2_pre_work_review:
548:     purpose: Review skills folder and project standards
549:     activities:
550:     - Read and review AGENTS.md (project principles)
551:     - Check skills folder (.opencode/skills/) for relevant coding standards
552:     - Extract coding standards summary
553:     - Identify architectural patterns
554:     - Document project conventions
555:     - Identify constraints
556:     - Verify principle alignment
557:     required_documents: [AGENTS.md, "Skills folder (if available)"]
558:     verification: MUST_REVIEW
559:     validation: principles_established
560: 
561:   phase_3_research:
562:     condition: |
563:       research_triggered = FALSE
564:       IF ":with-research" in command_flags:
565:         research_triggered = TRUE; trigger_reason = "explicit_flag"
566:       ELSE IF confidence_score < 60:
567:         research_triggered = TRUE; trigger_reason = "uncertainty_auto_detected"
568:     actions:
569:       if_triggered:
570:       - log: "Initiating research phase (reason: {trigger_reason})"
571:       - execute_workflow: "../deep/assets/deep_research_auto.yaml"
572:       - on_complete: "show_checkpoint"
573:       if_skipped:
574:       - log: "Research phase skipped (confidence: {confidence_score}%)"
575:       - continue_to: "step_3"
576: 
577:   step_3_specification:
578:     purpose: Create comprehensive feature specification
579:     pre_phase_parallel_check:
580:       enabled: true
581:       phase_domains: [code, docs]
582:       on_parallel_dispatch:
583:         agents:
584:         - { name: "spec_explorer", focus: "Existing specifications and patterns" }
585:         - { name: "requirement_analyzer", focus: "Similar features and requirements" }
586:       fallback: "Proceed with activities below"
587:     activities:
588:     - Find highest feature number across all sources
589:     - Run create.sh script (scripts/spec/create.sh) with calculated number
590:     - Estimate complexity and select documentation level using progressive enhancement:
591:       - "Level 1 (Baseline): <100 LOC - spec.md + plan.md + tasks.md"
592:       - "Level 2 (Verification): 100-499 LOC - Level 1 + checklist.md"
593:       - "Level 3 (Full): >=500 LOC - Level 2 + decision-record.md"
594:     - Load spec.md and use as EXACT structure
595:     - Parse user description and extract key concepts
596:     - Identify actors, actions, data, constraints
597:     - Make informed guesses based on context for unclear aspects
598:     - Fill User Scenarios & Testing section
599:     - Generate Functional Requirements (testable)
600:     - Define Success Criteria (measurable, technology-agnostic)
601:     - Identify Key Entities if data involved
602:     - For Level 2+, include mandatory checklist.md
603:     - For Level 3, include decision-record.md with Traceability, Risk Matrix, Rollback Plan
604:     confidence_checkpoint:
605:       evaluate_at: "After drafting spec.md content"
606:       scoring_factors: ["Requirements completeness (0.35)", "Acceptance criteria clarity (0.35)", "Technical feasibility (0.30)"]
607:       thresholds:
608:         high_80_plus: { action: "Finalize spec.md and proceed to Step 4" }
609:         medium_40_79: { action: "Add [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] markers to uncertain sections" }
610:         low_below_40: { action: "STOP - Ask clarification before finalizing spec", wait_for: "User response" }
611:     outputs:
612:     - spec.md: acceptance_criteria
613:     - location: "[SPEC_FOLDER]/spec.md"
614:     template: level_contract_spec.md
615:     template_prompt_contract:
616:       canonical_template: level_contract_spec.md
617:       inline_scaffold_key: spec_md
618:       writing_rule: "Embed template_compliance.inline_scaffolds.spec_md in the prompt before writing spec.md and preserve the required anchors/headers in order."
619:     post_write_validation:
620:       command: ".opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/spec/validate.sh [SPEC_FOLDER] --strict"
621:       on_fail: "STOP and repair spec.md template drift before proceeding"
622:     validation: spec_complete
623: 
624:   step_4_clarification:
625:     purpose: Resolve ambiguities and clarify requirements
626:     activities:
627:     - Extract all [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] markers from spec
628:     - Limit to maximum 3 clarifications (prioritize by impact)
629:     - Make informed guesses for lower-priority items
630:     - For each clarification, research codebase for patterns
631:     - Test in browser when staging URL provided
632:     - Resolve ambiguities through systematic investigation
633:     - Update spec.md with resolved clarifications
634:     - Document all assumptions made
635:     outputs: [resolved_ambiguities, clarified_requirements, updated_spec]
636:     validation: requirements_clear
637: 
638:   step_5_quality_checklist:
639:     purpose: Generate validation checklist AND USE FOR ACTIVE VERIFICATION (Level 2+ requirement)
640:     level_requirement: "Level 2+ (Verification and Full)"
641:     activities:
642:     - Check documentation level - skip for Level 1, MANDATORY for Level 2+
643:     - Load checklist.md template
644:     - Generate domain-specific validation items with priorities (P0/P1/P2)
645:     - Create checklist file at FEATURE_DIR/checklist.md
646:     - "FOR EACH ITEM: Verify condition → Mark [x] with evidence → If not met: document blocker/deferral"
647:     - Ensure ALL P0 items are complete (HARD BLOCKER)
648:     - Ensure ALL P1 items complete or user-approved deferral
649:     - Document P2 deferrals with reasons
650:     verification_protocol:
651:       p0_handling: "BLOCKER - Cannot proceed without completion"
652:       p1_handling: "Required - Complete or get user approval to defer"
653:       p2_handling: "Optional - Can defer with documented reason"
654:     outputs:
655:     - quality_checklist: generated
656:     - location: "[SPEC_FOLDER]/checklist.md"
657:     - checklist_status: pass_or_fail
658:     - p0_status: "all_complete or blocked"
659:     template: level_contract_checklist.md
660:     template_prompt_contract:
661:       canonical_template: level_contract_checklist.md
662:       inline_scaffold_key: checklist_md
663:       writing_rule: "Embed template_compliance.inline_scaffolds.checklist_md in the prompt before writing checklist.md and preserve CHK-NNN [P0/P1/P2] format."
664:     post_write_validation:
665:       command: ".opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/spec/validate.sh [SPEC_FOLDER] --strict"
666:       on_fail: "STOP and repair checklist.md template drift before proceeding"
667:     validation: checklist_verified_and_marked
668: 
669:   step_6_planning:
670:     purpose: Create technical plan with implementation approach
671: 
672:     parallel_dispatch_note: |
673:       Dispatches 4 parallel agents via Task tool: Architecture, Feature, Dependency, Test Explorer.
674:       Parallel dispatch is integral to this phase - no additional question asked.
675: 
676:     inline_parallel_exploration:
677:       execution: { tool: Task, subagent_type: context, model: opus, parallel: true }
678:       agents:
679:         architecture_explorer:
680:           focus: "Project structure, entry points, component connections"
681:           prompt: |
682:             Explore codebase architecture for: {task_description}
683:             Use Code Graph structural queries (code_graph_query) + Grep for concept discovery.
684:             Query Code Graph for callers, imports, symbols, and outlines; build Grep patterns from likely names, domain terms, and error strings (e.g., "project architecture entry points").
685:             Verify hits with Read; do not use memory_search for arbitrary code.
686:             Return: 1) Architecture hypothesis 2) Full file paths 3) Patterns noticed
687:             Do NOT draw conclusions - just report findings.
688:         feature_explorer:
689:           focus: "Similar features, related patterns"
690:           prompt: |
691:             Explore codebase for similar features/patterns for: {task_description}
692:             Use Code Graph structural queries (code_graph_query) + Grep for concept discovery.
693:             Query Code Graph for callers, imports, symbols, and outlines; build Grep patterns from likely names, domain terms, and error strings (e.g., "similar feature implementation patterns").
694:             Verify hits with Read; do not use memory_search for arbitrary code.
695:             Return: 1) Similar features hypothesis 2) Full file paths 3) Patterns noticed
696:             Do NOT draw conclusions - just report findings.
697:         dependency_explorer:
698:           focus: "Imports, modules, affected areas"
699:           prompt: |
700:             Explore dependencies and integration points for: {task_description}
701:             Use Code Graph structural queries (code_graph_query) + Grep for concept discovery.
702:             Query Code Graph for callers, imports, symbols, and outlines; build Grep patterns from likely names, domain terms, and error strings (e.g., "module imports dependencies").
703:             Verify hits with Read; do not use memory_search for arbitrary code.
704:             Return: 1) Affected modules hypothesis 2) Full file paths 3) Patterns noticed
705:             Do NOT draw conclusions - just report findings.
706:         test_explorer:
707:           focus: "Test patterns, testing infrastructure"
708:           prompt: |
709:             Explore test patterns and testing infrastructure.
710:             Use Code Graph structural queries (code_graph_query) + Grep for concept discovery.
711:             Query Code Graph for callers, imports, symbols, and outlines; build Grep patterns from likely names, domain terms, and error strings (e.g., "test infrastructure patterns").
712:             Verify hits with Read; do not use memory_search for arbitrary code.
713:             Return: 1) Testing hypothesis 2) Full test file paths 3) Patterns noticed
714:             Do NOT draw conclusions - just report findings.
715:       verification:
716:         approach:
717:         - "Read each file identified by @context agents"
718:         - "Verify or refute each hypothesis"
719:         - "Cross-reference findings across agents"
720:         - "Build complete mental model"
721:         - "Resolve conflicting hypotheses"
722:       outputs: [architecture_findings, feature_findings, dependency_findings, test_findings, verified_mental_model]
723:       fallback: { on_failure: "Use inline planning activities below" }
724: 
725:     activities:
726:     - Run check-prerequisites.sh --json --paths-only to get feature paths
727:     - Load FEATURE_SPEC and AGENTS.md
728:     - Load plan.md and preserve exact structure
729:     - Fill Technical Context (mark unknowns as NEEDS CLARIFICATION)
730:     - Fill Constitution Check section
731:     - Evaluate gates (ERROR if violations unjustified)
732:     - Phase 0: Generate research/research.md to resolve all unknowns
733:     - Phase 1: Define component structure and interfaces
734:     - Generate Testing Strategy with test pyramid
735:     - Generate Success Metrics from spec criteria
736:     - Import Risk Matrix from spec
737:     - Generate Dependencies Tables
738:     - Generate Communication & Review sections
739:     - Re-evaluate Constitution Check post-design
740:     - Generate Phase 2-4 outlines (implementation phases)
741:     outputs:
742:     - plan.md: technical_approach
743:     - research/research.md: resolved_unknowns
744:     level_1_baseline: [spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md]
745:     level_2_verification: [checklist.md]
746:     level_3_full: [decision-record.md]
747:     decision_records:
748:       # Narrative trigger label (T-YML-CMP-01 / S7): moved from `when:` because this is a
749:       # content-generation trigger tag, not a mechanical BooleanExpr predicate.
750:       trigger_reason: significant_technical_decision_needs_documentation
751:       template: level_contract_decision-record.md
752:       inline_scaffold_key: decision_record_md
753:     template: level_contract_plan.md
754:     template_prompt_contract:
755:       canonical_template: level_contract_plan.md
756:       inline_scaffold_key: plan_md
757:       writing_rule: "Embed template_compliance.inline_scaffolds.plan_md in the prompt before writing plan.md and keep custom sections after the required template structure."
758:     confidence_checkpoint:
759:       evaluate_at: "After drafting plan.md content"
760:       scoring_factors: ["Technical approach clarity (0.30)", "Risk identification (0.25)", "Dependency mapping (0.25)", "Pattern alignment (0.20)"]
761:       thresholds:
762:         high_80_plus: { action: "Finalize plan.md and proceed to Step 7", cite: "Document key sources in plan.md" }
763:         medium_40_79: { action: "Proceed but flag uncertainties", requirement: "Add RISK markers" }
764:         low_below_40: { action: "STOP - Request research spike or clarification", wait_for: "User decision" }
765:       escalation: { trigger: "2 failed attempts OR 10 minutes", action: "Present options to user" }
766:     post_write_validation:
767:       command: ".opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/spec/validate.sh [SPEC_FOLDER] --strict"
768:       on_fail: "STOP and repair plan.md or decision-record.md template drift before proceeding"
769:     validation: approach_defined
770: 
771:   step_6_5_checkpoint_planning:
772:     purpose: Save context checkpoint after planning phase complete
773:     checkpoint: true
774:     memory_action: save
775:     activities:
776:     - Save context checkpoint using system-spec-kit skill
777:     - Record progress up to planning milestone for session recovery
778:     - Preserve planning decisions, exploration findings, and technical approach
779:     tool_invocation:
780:       command: Read(".opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/SKILL.md")
781:       note: "Intermediate checkpoint - planning phase complete"
782:     outputs:
783:     - checkpoint_file: "[SPEC_FOLDER]/scratch/checkpoint__planning_complete.md"
784:     validation: checkpoint_saved
785: 
786:   step_7_task_breakdown:
787:     purpose: Break plan into executable implementation tasks (Level 1+ requirement)
788:     level_requirement: "Level 1+ (Baseline - required at all levels)"
789:     activities:
790:     - Run check-prerequisites.sh --json to get FEATURE_DIR
791:     - Load plan.md for tech stack and architecture
792:     - Load spec.md for user stories and priorities
793:     - Load optional artifacts (research)
794:     - Extract user stories with priorities (P0, P1, P2, P3)
795:     - Generate tasks organized by user story
796:     - Create dependency graph for task ordering
797:     - Mark parallel-executable tasks with [P]
798:     - Define task phases (Setup, Tests, Core, Integration, Polish)
799:     - Generate time estimates (15-60 min per task)
800:     - Create tasks.md with proper structure
801:     - Validate task format and coverage
802:     outputs:
803:     - tasks.md: implementation_breakdown
804:     template: level_contract_tasks.md
805:     template_prompt_contract:
806:       canonical_template: level_contract_tasks.md
807:       inline_scaffold_key: tasks_md
808:       writing_rule: "Embed template_compliance.inline_scaffolds.tasks_md in the prompt before writing tasks.md and preserve the required anchors/headers in order."
809:     post_write_validation:
810:       command: ".opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/spec/validate.sh [SPEC_FOLDER] --strict"
811:       on_fail: "STOP and repair tasks.md template drift before proceeding"
812:     validation: tasks_documented
813: 
814:     phase_gate_checkpoint:
815:       trigger: "After Step 7 completes"
816:       action: |
817:         STOP and verify Phase Gate:
818:         1. spec.md exists → If not, return to Step 3
819:         2. plan.md exists → If not, return to Step 6
820:         3. tasks.md exists → If not, this step failed
821:         4. No [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] in spec.md
822:         5. Mark "PHASE GATE: PASSED"
823:         6. ONLY THEN proceed to Step 8
824:       enforcement: HARD_BLOCK
825: 
826:   step_8_analysis:
827:     purpose: Verify consistency across all artifacts
828:     pre_phase_parallel_check:
829:       enabled: true
830:       phase_domains: [code, docs, analysis]
831:       complexity_boost: 10
832:       on_parallel_dispatch:
833:         agents:
834:         - { name: "consistency_analyzer", focus: "Cross-artifact consistency and requirement coverage" }
835:         - { name: "gap_detector", focus: "Missing requirements, underspecification, edge cases" }
836:       fallback: "Proceed with activities below"
837:     activities:
838:     - Load all artifacts (spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md)
839:     - Build requirements inventory from spec
840:     - Build task coverage mapping from tasks
841:     - Run detection passes for: Duplication, Ambiguity, Underspecification, Constitution alignment, Coverage, Inconsistency
842:     - Assign severity levels (CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW)
843:     - Generate consistency report, coverage verification, gap analysis
844:     - Suggest remediations (non-destructive, user must approve)
845:     outputs: [consistency_report, coverage_verification, alignment_check, gap_analysis]
846:     validation: consistency_verified
847: 
848:   step_9_implementation_check:
849:     purpose: Verify all prerequisites for implementation
850:     activities:
851:     - Run check-prerequisites.sh --json --require-tasks
852:     - Verify plan.md and tasks.md exist
853:     - Check all checklists status
854:     - Verify no blockers exist
855:     - Verify environment is ready
856:     - Verify dependencies loaded
857:     - Generate implementation greenlight report
858:     checks: { prerequisites: verified, blockers: none, environment: ready }
859:     validation: prerequisites_verified
860: 
861:   step_9_5_preflight:
862:     name: "PREFLIGHT Capture"
863:     purpose: "Capture epistemic baseline before implementation"
864:     tool: "task_preflight"
865:     parameters: "specFolder, taskId, knowledgeScore, uncertaintyScore, contextScore"
866:     skip_conditions: ["Less than 10 LOC change", "User says skip preflight"]
867: 
868:   step_10_development:
869:     purpose: Execute implementation following task plan
870:     pre_phase_parallel_check:
871:       enabled: true
872:       phase_domains: [code, testing]
873:       complexity_boost: 15
874:       on_parallel_dispatch:
875:         agents:
876:         - { name: "implementation_agent", focus: "Core implementation tasks from tasks.md" }
877:         - { name: "test_agent", focus: "Test implementation and validation" }
878:         warning: "Development tasks may have dependencies - verify task order"
879:       fallback: "Proceed with activities below"
880:     activities:
881:     - Load sk-code authoring-time resources for OpenCode targets — when any task in tasks.md targets a path under .opencode/skills/, .opencode/agents/, .opencode/commands/, or .opencode/specs/, load the matching sk-code authoring checklist (assets/opencode/checklists/{skill,agent,command,mcp_server,spec_folder}_authoring.md) AND assets/opencode/recipes/spec_folder_write.md BEFORE the first write. Authoring-time load is distinct from review-time load (see agent_dispatch.review.standards_contract). Skip when no .opencode/ targets are present.
882:     - Load tasks.md and parse task structure
883:     - Execute implementation phase by phase
884:     - Setup first (project structure, dependencies, configuration)
